ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "polarity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polarity */,
  "field_strength" REAL /* Field strength at 3m (dBm V/m) */,
  "limit" REAL /* Limit at 3m (dBm V/m) */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin (dB) */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the measurement */,
  "measurement_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "measurement_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the measurement */,
  "measurement_source" TEXT /* Source of the measurement (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_polarity_id FOREIGN KEY ("polarity_id") REFERENCES polarities ("polarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency value (MHz) */,
  "frequency_band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band */,
  "frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polarities" (
  "polarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polarity */,
  "polarity" TEXT /* Polarity value (H/V) */,
  "polarity_description" TEXT /* Description of the polarity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polarity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "device_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., indoor, outdoor) */,
  "location_environment" TEXT /* Environment of the location (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_devices" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the device was used for the measurement */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device during the measurement (e.g., operational, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "device_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the version */,
  "version_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_version_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_tags_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "comment_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the comment (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_comments_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was updated */,
  "history_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments for the history entry */,
  "history_author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the history entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES measurement_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_history_history_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("history_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency band */,
  "frequency_band" TEXT /* Name of the frequency band */,
  "band_description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_frequency_bands" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency band */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id", "band_id")
)
